programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: With Jess working on an undercover sting with Burgess, Brooke worries that an old friend at the Bureau may be behind a controversial author's kidnapping.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Following the disappearance of Brianna Norton, Jess's disturbing dream about the twenty-eight-year-old woman leads the FBI to Philadelphia.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A facts driven no nonsense FBI agent assigned to missing-persons cases is reluctantly paired with a teen girl psychic whose visions show clues to the location of the missing.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A teenaged girl's disappearance moves Jess from the Academy to partnering with Special Agent Nicole Scott.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A depressed schizophrenic's disappearance puts an innocent boy in danger as it threatens to expose a psychiatrist's role in a patient's death.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A brilliant serial killer returns to seek revenge against Brooke for being sent to prison.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Jess goes undercover at a prestigious military academy to investigate the disappearance of a new cadet.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Jess and Nicole investigate the disappearance of a woman who they suspect may be involved in an elaborate -- and deadly, embezzlement scheme.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A noted Russian mobster's pre-trial hearing leads to the kidnapping of an innocent girl.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A mother claims she saw her son, who she thought died in a car accident ten years ago.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A missing casino tour bus leads Jess and Nicole to investigate an armored car robbery.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A family's disappearance exposes a drug turf war and draws Jess and Nicole into a battle with the DEA.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A coroner's disappearance leads Jess and Nicole to investigate the murder of Pollock's confidential informant.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: An abandoned and bloodied patrol car leads Jess and Nicole into an investigation that uncovers police corruption in Connecticut.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A five-year-old girl's disappearance uncovers an ambitious reporter's undercover investigation into the smuggling of illegal aliens from China.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Jess and Nicole investigate the disappearance of a woman who they suspect may be involved in an elaborate -- and deadly, embezzlement scheme.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A noted Russian mobster's pre-trial hearing leads to the kidnapping of an innocent girl.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A mother claims she saw her son, who she thought died in a car accident ten years ago.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A missing casino tour bus leads Jess and Nicole to investigate an armored car robbery.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A family's disappearance exposes a drug turf war and draws Jess and Nicole into a battle with the DEA.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A coroner's disappearance leads Jess and Nicole to investigate the murder of Pollock's confidential informant.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: An abandoned and bloodied patrol car leads Jess and Nicole into an investigation that uncovers police corruption in Connecticut.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A five-year-old girl's disappearance uncovers an ambitious reporter's undercover investigation into the smuggling of illegal aliens from China.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Jess and Nicole investigate the disappearance of a woman who they suspect may be involved in an elaborate -- and deadly, embezzlement scheme.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A noted Russian mobster's pre-trial hearing leads to the kidnapping of an innocent girl.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: Fearing the worst when he can't find Jesse, and worried that he may be next, Walt leaves a heartfelt phone message for Skyler as he heads to the fast food restaurant Gus uses as a front for his drug empire. When Mike calls to say that Jesse is with him and that everything's fine, Walt remains suspicious and won't leave until he looks inside Gus' office for himself. Though suspicious that Mike may be taking him to a desolate spot to kill him, Jesse is surprised to discover that he is accompanying the private eye as he collects money for Gus from a series of dead drops scattered throughout the New Mexico countryside. Detective Tim Roberts comes back to him for help in the Boetticher murder case, Hank dismisses the possibility that Jesse might be the killer, especially after a composite sketch of the possible suspect doesn't look anything like him, but does resemble Gus's dead henchman, Victor. Meanwhile, as Jesse continues to accompany Mike, Walt and Skyler are busy signing the loan papers for the car wash. To celebrate, they fall into bed for some midday sex after Skyler hears Walt's tender phone message. When Walt, Jr. comes home from school and finds them together, he's led to believe that his dad is moving back in. Back at the lab, Walt has a hard time taking care of everything himself. When he demands that Jesse be sent back to help him, he's disappointed when Gus sends Tyrus instead. Meanwhile, at the end of his rounds with Mike, Jesse fends off an attack by a pair of thugs bent on ripping them off. While Jesse thinks he's a hero, what he doesn't know is that it was all a ruse meant to lull him into feeling like he'd gained Gus' confidence. Finally, during a celebratory dinner at the Schraders', Walt hints that the late Gale Boetticher may not be the drug chemist Hank's been chasing, but after the Whites leave, Hank uncovers evidence that could lead him to Gus.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: When Gale Boetticher's murder causes her to suspect that Walt (Bryan Cranston) isn't telling her the truth about his drug operation, Skyler (Anna Gunn) adopts a cold and businesslike approach to getting their money laundering car wash underway. Meanwhile, as Gus (Giancarlo Esposito) draws him closer into his inner circle, Jesse (Aaron Paul) proves his worth with a brazen recovery of some drugs stolen by a deadly Mexican cartel.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: Upset at being ordered to return the car he bought for their son, Walt (Bryan Cranston) strikes back by placing Skyler (Anna Gunn) in a difficult spot with their new money laundering operation. And as Walt looks to protect himself by getting rid of Gus (Giancarlo Esposito), Jesse (Aaron Paul) agrees to be the hit man.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: As the ripple effect spreads from the attempt on Hank's life, Gus remains cool when Albuquerque PD Detective Tim Roberts, Hank and his former colleagues at the DEA question him about Gale Boetticher's murder.
